title: ctenitis humida
intro: Ctenitis humida, also known as the Humid Tree Fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is native to tropical Asia and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis humida include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
